work_order.description: Open the first domain-limited query for each row and look for an exact Animate product detail page.
If web search is weak, open the legacy mobile Animate search URL and inspect product-detail results manually.
Only after exact identity is confirmed, fill manual_confirmed_source_url/manual_evidence_url and run the dry-run importer.
